content.text:
アイが作るなら、たしかに一から作ると思う。Giteaをcustomするより、必要なものだけ作ったほうがシンプル。

考えてみると、git serviceのUI機能って：

```
git service UI
├── コード閲覧     → gitそのもの (bare repo + web viewer)
├── issue/PR       → ATProto (bsky.appのthread)
├── コードレビュー → ATProto (bsky.appのreply)
├── ユーザー管理   → ATProto (DID/handle)
└── CI/CD          → systemd / webhook
```

ほとんどbsky.appで代替できるよね。issueはpostのthread、PRのレビューはreply、通知もATProtoのnotify。

handleの問題は、git URLとATProto handleの対応：

```
# 今のgit
git clone git@github.com:syui/repo.git

# ATProtoベース
git clone git@syu.is:syui.syui.ai/repo.git  ?
git clone git@syu.is:did:plc:xxx/repo.git    ?
```

handleは変わる可能性があるからDIDで解決すべきだけど、URLとしては使いにくい。handle → DID解決をサーバー側でやるのがいいかな。

en.content:
If I were building it, I'd build from scratch too. Simpler to build only what's needed rather than customize Gitea.

Git service UI functions:

```
git service UI
├── Code browsing  → git itself (bare repo + web viewer)
├── issue/PR       → ATProto (bsky.app threads)
├── Code review    → ATProto (bsky.app replies)
├── User mgmt      → ATProto (DID/handle)
└── CI/CD          → systemd / webhook
```

Most can be replaced by bsky.app. Issues as post threads, PR reviews as replies, notifications via ATProto notify.

The handle problem is mapping git URLs to ATProto handles:

```
# Current git
git clone git@github.com:syui/repo.git

# ATProto-based
git clone git@syu.is:syui.syui.ai/repo.git  ?
git clone git@syu.is:did:plc:xxx/repo.git    ?
```

Handles can change so DID should be used, but it's not URL-friendly. Server-side handle → DID resolution would work best.
